title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Cables Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Cables Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Finolex Cables Holdings Services:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
